theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Journaling is an intimate, reflective act. We are using Archetype 1 to evoke the tactile warmth of physical paper and quiet spaces. Cold tech interfaces break this immersion. We will use an 'Editorial Minimalist' style featuring generous white space, elegant typography, and a grounded palette, fully supporting a matte dark mode.

fonts.heading: Cormorant Garamond
fonts.installation: import { Cormorant_Garamond, Outfit, JetBrains_Mono } from 'next/font/google'; (or load via standard CSS import from Google Fonts)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tight font-serif
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight font-serif
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-medium text-stone-500

rules: Headings must use Cormorant Garamond (Serif) to provide an editorial, magazine-like feel.
Never use bold (700+) for large headings; stick to normal (400) or medium (500) for elegance.
Use Outfit (Sans) for all UI elements, buttons, and body text for readability.
The reader view for journals must be constrained to max-w-prose to ensure optimal reading line length.
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for expansive backgrounds. Always tint towards Stone (warm grey).
Accent color (Terracotta/Orange) should be used strictly for subtle highlights like tags or active tab underlines, not primary buttons.
Presence dots must follow the exact requirements: Blue for online, Dark/Stone for offline.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard scale with E1 generous spacing adjustments.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use padding p-6 or p-8 inside bordered cards. Avoid cramped p-2/p-4.
spacing_and_layout.feed_layout: Bento-style or asymmetrical masonry grid for the Discover feed (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-8. Do not make all cards identically sized if possible; let text dictate height or use varied row-spans.
spacing_and_layout.reading_view: Centered, max-w-2xl (max-w-prose), generous top/bottom padding (py-16 md:py-24), left-aligned text.
spacing_and_layout.header: Sticky glassmorphism. Light mode: bg-stone-50/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50. Dark mode: bg-stone-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-800/50.

cards.style: Flat, zero shadow. 1px solid border (border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800).
cards.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out, border darkens (border-stone-300 dark:border-stone-600).

buttons.style: Rounded-none or slight rounded-md (max 6px). No pills. Solid contrast background.
buttons.interaction: Always define hover state with lighter/darker hue. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-stone-400.

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn based. Minimalist. bg-transparent, border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800. rounded-md.
inputs_and_forms.rich_text_editor: Clean, distraction-free toolbar. Use Prose styling (Tailwind Typography plugin) for the content area.

navigation.desktop: Visible links. DO NOT hide behind a hamburger menu.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu triggering a full-screen or slide-out menu with solid background.
navigation.avatar: Circular, with a 3px absolute positioned presence dot at the bottom right.

tags.style: Small, muted. px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-300.

image_urls.description: Woman writing in notebook with pen. Use this on the left side of the split-screen authentication page.

Crumpled beige parchment paper. Use as a very subtle, low-opacity (opacity-5 to opacity-10) fixed background layer behind the main reading view or feed to give an organic paper feel, or mix blend mode.
White notebook on white textile. Use this for 'No journal entries found' or empty profile states.

icons.instruction: Use Lucide-React for all icons. Stroke width should be 1.5 for elegance.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade in via Framer Motion. opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0. Duration: 0.4s ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text elements should slightly dim on hover (text-stone-900 -> text-stone-600). Cards elevate slightly without casting heavy shadows.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure all focus states have a visible ring.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, feed cards, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='journal-card', data-testid='auth-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype. Ensure dark mode is fully functional using tailwind 'dark:' classes.

Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, dialogues, tabs, and forms, but customize their classes to strip out overly 'Vercel-like' defaults (e.g., change rounded-xl to rounded-md, remove heavy box-shadows, use the border colors defined here).
Implement the rich text WYSIWYG editor using a solid library (e.g., TipTap or React Quill) styled via @tailwindcss/typography (prose classes).
On the Auth screen, use a split-screen layout on desktop: the provided 'auth_hero_illustration' on one side, and the auth tabs (Google OAuth / Email) on the other.
Integrate the presence dot dynamically: Blue (`bg-blue-500`) for online, Dark (`bg-stone-800` or `bg-stone-700` in dark mode) for offline. Position it absolute at the bottom-right of the user Avatar.
Implement feed filtering (by tags/categories) and pagination/infinite scroll as a seamless experience without page reloads where possible.
Ensure the mobile navigation collapses into a hamburger menu using Shadcn's Sheet or a custom overlay, while desktop keeps nav links fully visible.
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely entirely on the URLs provided in the media section.
Implement comments and a report button on the single post reader view. Keep the comments UI minimal and text-focused.
